Activates on onCustomEditor. Registers DiagramEditorProvider, LM tools, and commands (newDiagram, sortNodes, autoLayout, undo, redo)."},{"id":"n2","label":"DiagramEditorProvider","shape":"rounded","color":"blue","x":880,"y":-620,"width":200,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g1","notes":"Custom text editor provider. Manages webview lifecycle, routes messages to DiagramService, VIEW_METADATA shows formatted JSON doc."},{"id":"n3","label":"DiagramService","shape":"rounded","color":"blue","x":900,"y":-460,"width":160,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g1","notes":"Core state manager. Parses/serialises .diagram.svg, manages undo/redo history, drives sortNodes and autoLayout. New: setLlmNotes() persists agent observations into meta.llmNotes."},{"id":"n4","label":"LM Tools","shape":"rounded","color":"purple","x":200,"y":-420,"width":130,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g1","notes":"Copilot LM tools: readDiagram, getDiagram, addNodes, addEdges (bidirectional support), updateNodes, updateEdges, removeNodes, removeEdges, addGroups, updateGroups, removeGroups, setLlmNotes (agent memory)."},{"id":"n5","label":"lib/","shape":"cylinder","color":"default","x":1120,"y":-300,"width":160,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g1","notes":"Shared libraries: exporters (buildDocumentSvg, buildMermaid), svgMetadata (parse/unescape), layoutEngine (dagre), operations (CRUD incl. bidirectional edges), agentContext (LLM metadata, llmNotes surfacing), SchemaValidator."},{"id":"n10","label":".diagram.svg","shape":"cylinder","color":"gray","x":550,"y":40,"width":140,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g3","notes":"SVG file with diagram JSON embedded in diagramflow:source inside metadata. Viewable as SVG in any editor, editable via DiagramFlow."},{"id":"n6","label":"useGraphState","shape":"rounded","color":"green","x":412,"y":380,"width":160,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g2","notes":"Bridge hook. Manages ReactFlow state. Sends postMessage to extension host. Handles incoming commands (sort, autoLayout, add, delete, etc.)."},{"id":"n7","label":"CanvasPanel","shape":"rounded","color":"green","x":640,"y":380,"width":140,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g2","notes":"Main canvas. Wraps ReactFlow. Handles node/edge drag, selection, zoom/pan. Renders all node and edge types."},{"id":"n8","label":"Toolbar","shape":"rounded","color":"green","x":440,"y":500,"width":120,"height":48,"pinned":true,"group":"g2","notes":"Top toolbar.
